presets.prompt: Dry acoustic drum kit shaped for Iraqi 1970s tarab: muted kick, restrained snare, soft toms and sparse cymbal movement. Human timing, low density and clear space for vocals.
presets.exclude: modern pop kit, trap, EDM, huge cymbals, busy fills, electronic percussion

presets.prompt: Modern Arabic pop drum kit with a tight kick, crisp controlled snare, subtle ghost notes and clean hi-hat detail. Radio-ready but restrained, with no festival energy.
presets.exclude: trap hats, EDM kick, festival beat, heavy fills, darbuka loop, wedding groove

presets.prompt: Soft acoustic brush-kit groove for an emotional Arabic ballad, using muted kick, dry brushed snare and sparse cymbal detail. Intimate, slow-breathing and supportive.
presets.exclude: rock drums, big cymbals, trap, EDM, busy fills, electronic kit

presets.prompt: Punchy neo-pop drum groove with compact low-end, short snare body, controlled transient detail and subtle human syncopation. Designed for modern Iraqi pop without generic Arabic loops.
presets.exclude: trap, EDM, festival beat, tabla loop, darbuka loop, overcompressed drums

presets.prompt: Short acoustic tom-led transition with restrained kick support and one purposeful fill. Natural dynamic build, dry impact and immediate stop before the next section.
presets.exclude: cinematic taiko, epic drums, EDM riser, continuous groove, huge reverb, busy fills

presets.prompt: Warm acoustic double bass with rounded attack, sparse root movement and restrained passing tones. Natural timing, controlled sustain and no jazz walking.
presets.exclude: electric bass, slap, jazz walking, synth bass, solo, distortion

presets.prompt: Single fretless electric bass with warm finger attack, subtle slides and expressive microtonal approach notes. Sparse Arabic phrasing without becoming a lead melody.
presets.exclude: slap bass, funk, rock bass, synth bass, busy fills, chorus wash

presets.prompt: Warm fingerstyle electric bass with soft attack, round low mids and simple supportive movement. Tight with the rhythm while leaving the vocal and melody unobstructed.
presets.exclude: slap, pick bass, funk, rock riff, wobble bass, lead melody

presets.prompt: Single clean sub-bass layer with smooth sustained notes, minimal movement and controlled low-end weight. No melodic distraction and no audible distortion.
presets.exclude: wobble, distortion, reese bass, slap, funk, lead melody

presets.prompt: Warm analog synth bass with rounded envelope, soft attack and restrained note movement. Stable low-end support for Iraqi and Arabic pop without EDM aggression.
presets.exclude: acid bass, reese, wobble, festival bass, distortion, lead synth

presets.prompt: Single short-neck bowl-backed fretless lute with paired courses, dark wooden resonance, firm risha attack and short natural sustain. Restrained rhythmic support with no guitar voicings.
presets.exclude: nylon guitar, classical guitar, pseudo-oud, flamenco, commercial oud preset, bright oriental pluck

presets.prompt: Single real wooden Iraqi oud performing concise single-note phrases with firm risha articulation, natural string buzz and restrained tremolo. No chord strumming and no pseudo-guitar tone.
presets.exclude: nylon guitar, classical guitar, pseudo-oud, flamenco, chord strumming, synthetic oud

presets.prompt: Single steel-string acoustic guitar with warm wooden body, soft fingerstyle articulation and sparse open voicings. Gentle modern support with no lead melody.
presets.exclude: nylon guitar, flamenco, rock strumming, solo, reverb wash, bright pick noise

presets.prompt: Clean electric guitar with rounded neck-pickup tone, soft finger attack, restrained slides and short lyrical answers between vocal phrases. No rock distortion.
presets.exclude: distortion, rock solo, metal, funk wah, dense chords, ambient reverb wash

presets.prompt: Muted clean electric guitar playing short syncopated support notes with dry palm-muted attack and minimal sustain. Tight, sparse and suitable for modern Arabic pop.
presets.exclude: funk guitar, wah, rock distortion, lead solo, dense strumming, large reverb

presets.prompt: Warm vintage Rhodes bed with soft sustained voicings, restrained harmonic movement and gentle bell tone. Low density, no soloing and clear vocal space.
presets.exclude: bright digital piano, jazz solo, busy comping, synth brass, lead melody, arpeggio

presets.prompt: Dry upright piano punctuation using short low-density notes at phrase endings. Natural hammer noise, immediate silence and no continuous comping.
presets.exclude: grand cinematic piano, arpeggio, solo, dense chords, reverb, busy comping

presets.prompt: Warm grand piano for an Arabic emotional ballad, using slow open voicings, controlled dynamics and sparse melodic punctuation. Elegant and vocal-first.
presets.exclude: cinematic piano, virtuoso solo, dense arpeggio, jazz harmony, huge reverb, bright pop piano

presets.prompt: Soft Hammond-style organ bed with warm drawbar body, slow chord movement and restrained rotary motion. Supportive, understated and free of gospel clichés.
presets.exclude: gospel organ solo, rock organ, fast rotary, bright drawbars, lead melody, dense chords

presets.prompt: Compact electric-piano lazim with a soft bell attack, short two-bar identity and intentional silence. Modern Arabic phrasing without copying the vocal melody.
presets.exclude: jazz solo, busy comping, bright digital piano, arpeggio loop, lead doubling, reverb wash

presets.prompt: Traditional live Riq and soft Darbuka performing a restrained Wahda Kabira pulse with controlled dum, dry tak and natural hand timing. Fills only at structural transitions.
presets.exclude: percussion solo, wedding groove, maqsoum loop, chobi, heavy fills, electronic percussion

presets.prompt: Light live Riq-led Malfuf pulse with delicate jingles, compact accents and restrained darbuka support. Human, dry and suitable for Arabic song transitions.
presets.exclude: wedding speed, dense darbuka, tabla loop, electronic percussion, heavy rolls, festival groove

presets.prompt: Controlled Iraqi chobi percussion layer with dry hand drums, grounded pulse and minimal celebratory accents. Authentic rhythmic identity without wedding-style overload.
presets.exclude: wedding ensemble, festival groove, electronic kick, crowd claps, heavy fills, loop overload

presets.prompt: Restrained Khaleeji mirwas and hand-percussion pattern with tight skin tone, subtle swing and clean spaces. Supportive rather than festive.
presets.exclude: wedding groove, fast folk loop, electronic percussion, heavy claps, dense fills, festival beat

presets.prompt: Single large frame drum with warm low hand strikes, wide spaces and subtle finger rolls before transitions. Natural skin resonance and restrained dynamics.
presets.exclude: cinematic taiko, huge impacts, fast rolls, drum kit, electronic low-end, reverb hall

presets.prompt: Single Iraqi Joza with raw skin-resonator tone, natural bow friction, restrained slides and microtonal phrasing. Short purposeful phrases with clear silence.
presets.exclude: western violin, string section, synthetic strings, epic orchestra, bass, chords

presets.prompt: Single dark acoustic violin with controlled portamento, restrained vibrato and Iraqi phrasing. Concise vocal-like lines that never become continuous.
presets.exclude: western classical violin, Balkan violin, gypsy violin, string section, cinematic strings, lead doubling

presets.prompt: Single warm cello in the low register with sparse bowed answers, restrained slides and long pauses. Keep clear of the vocal range and avoid cinematic weight.
presets.exclude: orchestra, trailer cello, ostinato, long solo, epic swell, string section

presets.prompt: Small restrained string section holding soft sustained harmony with gentle section lifts. Natural bow texture, low density and no lead melody.
presets.exclude: epic orchestra, trailer strings, fast runs, ostinato, lead violin, synthetic strings

presets.prompt: One viola and one cello performing a compact octave-unison phrase with warm bow tone, restrained slides and a concise cadence. No full section and no cinematic swell.
presets.exclude: full orchestra, violin section, epic strings, ostinato, lead doubling, large reverb

presets.prompt: Original monophonic hybrid lead with soft asymmetric attack, warm analog body, breath-textured upper layer, controlled portamento and maqam-aware pitch bends. Premium sound-design character, not an ethnic preset.
presets.exclude: stock Arabic lead, oriental preset, supersaw, EDM lead, synth brass, oud imitation, ney imitation

presets.prompt: Monophonic glass-organic hybrid lead with a clean transient, hollow resonant body, subtle wavetable motion and expressive pitch glide. Clear solo identity and restrained decay.
presets.exclude: EDM pluck, supersaw, stock ethnic lead, bright bell preset, chords, bass, reverb wash

presets.prompt: Original hybrid pluck with a muted non-guitar transient, warm digital body and subtle microtonal pitch movement. Short memorable motif with immediate silence.
presets.exclude: stock oriental pluck, oud imitation, qanun imitation, EDM pluck, bright bell, arpeggio loop

presets.prompt: Warm analog pad with slow attack, long controlled release and subtle harmonic drift. Stable background layer with no rhythmic pulse or lead contour.
presets.exclude: trance pad, supersaw, bright arpeggio, lead melody, cheap synth pad, shimmer wash

presets.prompt: Soft restrained synth pulse with rounded attack, low rhythmic density and gentle filter motion. Modern support that stays behind the vocal and rhythm section.
presets.exclude: EDM sequence, trance arpeggio, acid synth, lead melody, bright pluck, heavy sidechain
